name: fact_save
description: Save a fact or hypothesis to agent's knowledge base
description_for_agent: Use this skill to save important facts or hypotheses you discover. Facts are verified knowledge, hypotheses are unverified assumptions that need checking.

content.description: The fact or hypothesis text to save

type.description: Whether this is a verified fact or unverified hypothesis

source.description: Where the fact came from: agent, conversation, web, analysis, observation

verified.description: Whether the fact has been verified
